title: Get up! Savior
overview: Wataru fighting against the mysterious enemy "Dovazda". Captured by the evil spirit, Ryujinmaru sacrifices himself to help Wataru. Wataru faints in despair after losing Ryujinmaru. In a dream, Wataru hears the voice of Ryujin Maru and sees Mt. Sokai upside down.

title: Isn't the messenger dull?
overview: Up-Down City, a mysterious city where buildings move up and down. Wataru, Himiko, and Tora who visit there know that Mayor Wai-Fai is in trouble with the radio waves. Wataru was helping out with a delivery drone instead of a runaway delivery drone.

overview: Wataru, who has lost Ryujin Maru, cannot fight while Jakotora Maru and Genjin Maru are fighting. That's why Wataru goes out to the enemy genie, pulling out his sword, if he can't escape. At that time, light ran into the sky, and the voice of Ryujin Maru reached the ears of Wataru.

title: Red Flash! Double x Slash!
overview: Kennosuke loses his parents and runs the dojo alone. Shibarak was practicing as he grew up, but Kennosuke, who is bearish and crying, always runs away. Meanwhile, Hikashibou-Benke comes aiming for the treasure of the dojo, "Sword of the Red Dragon".

title: Fierce fight! Marriage? Fengyun Brechin Castle!
overview: Wataru and his friends were suddenly put in prison. However, King Ole-Dread, who governs the castle, told me that if he participated in a battle between genie and won the championship, his wish would come true ... On the other hand, in that battle, a boy who came from a foreign country drove the genie of the green aircraft and continued to win.

title: Shining! The power of the Holy Dragon!
overview: Ghoston loses control and runs away. The attacks of Jakutoramaru, Natsukimaru, and Senjinmaru are not effective at all, and there is no way to do it. While watching Ghoston revived even if he defeats him, Wataru realizes that there is one, and with the cooperation of Toraoh and Umihiko, he confronts Ghoston in person.

title: Laughing, crying, big genka !?
overview: Wataru who came to "Ryuguland" like an amusement park where everyone can enjoy smiling. After receiving the hospitality of the staff, he was in a good mood, but he couldn't enjoy the tiger king alone, and complained to Wataru, "It's not the case when you're playing in a place like this."

title: Two hearts and the last piece
overview: Wataru was fascinated by the fun of Ryuguland, but he regained his sanity when he was cheeked by the Tiger King. On the other hand, the tiger king who has nothing to do with the imaginary horn controlled by Otohime. While the evil tiger circle is defeated and unable to move, the tiger king still tries to stand up without fail.

title: The end of the dream, beyond the rainbow
overview: Wataru has been captured in the black Ryujinmaru. The words that Ryujinmaru responded to Wataru, who could not swallow the situation and questioned him, regretted having sacrificed himself to save Wataru. Wataru, who is shocked, points his sword at Shibaraku and the Tiger Kings while being manipulated by Ryujinmaru.
